zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de CLERMONT於大約1283年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德時，他的父親Robert de Clermont capet27歲，母親Béatrice de BOURGOGNE27歲。他與Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年8月10日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年34歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de CLERMONT于大约1283年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德时，他的父亲Robert de Clermont capet27岁，母亲Béatrice de BOURGOGNE27岁。他与Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1316年8月10日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年34岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CLERMONT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de CLERMONT was born about 1283, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Robert de Clermont capet, was 27 and his mother, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, was 27. He married Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 10 August 1316, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 34, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de CLERMONT est né environ 1283, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Robert de Clermont capet, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 août 1316, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de CLERMONT um 1283 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Clermont capet 27 und seine Mutter Béatrice de BOURGOGNE 27. Er hat Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. August 1316 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de CLERMONT è nato il circa 1283 nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Clermont capet, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 10 agosto 1316, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de CLERMONTが約1283年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで生まれた時，父Robert de Clermont capetは27歳，母Béatrice de BOURGOGNEは27歳であった。Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年8月10日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで34歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de CLERMONT(이)가 대략 1283년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Clermont capet(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de BOURGOGNE(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 8월 10일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de CLERMONT nasceu aproximadamente 1283, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Robert de Clermont capet, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1316, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de CLERMONT родился около 1283 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Clermont capet было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 10 августа 1316 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de CLERMONT nació aproximadamente 1283, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Robert de Clermont capet, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Béatrice de BOURGOGNE, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1316, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
